title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at PayU Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at PayU Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
PayU Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Gwalior. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PayU Digital Technologies:
PayU Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PayU Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
